overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating through a foggy Night City street at night. The character walks past neon-lit storefronts, enters a narrow alley, and approaches an NCART transit station before ascending to an open plaza with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with closed shutters and construction barriers

events.description: character stands up from crouching position and begins walking forward
exits narrow alley onto the main foggy street

agents.ego_description: player character stands up from looting a body on the ground and walks toward the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from camera down the alley

entered.detail: closed gray corrugated metal shutter on building facade
orange wooden temporary fence panel with metal framing
gray concrete surface with scattered debris and litter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow back alley at night. The player character is crouched over a body, then stands and walks forward. The alley features closed metal shutters and orange construction barriers. The character exits onto a main street with neon lighting visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past on the left side of the street
camera navigates through crowd of pedestrians, slightly shifting direction

agents.ego_description: walking briskly down the foggy street passing various pedestrians and navigating through moderate foot traffic

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving past on the wet street
pedestrian in white hat and blue jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing a man's face with text
pink neon sign with 'FASHION' text on building facade
tall pole with horizontal LED light fixture illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy commercial street lined with neon signs and digital billboards. The atmosphere is hazy with scattered pedestrians walking in opposing directions. A futuristic car passes by on the left as the character navigates through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow gated alleyway with scaffolding and trash bins

events.description: turns right into narrow gated alley with metal fencing
view temporarily blocked by vertical bars of the wrought iron gate

agents.ego_description: turns right off the main street into a narrow alleyway with metal fencing and construction scaffolding

notable_agents.action: character in red top crouching near trash bins in the alley corner

entered.detail: black metal fence gate with vertical bars at alley entrance
orange metal scaffolding structure against building wall with safety rails
large industrial garbage bins in the corner of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway enclosed by a wrought iron gate. Orange scaffolding lines the right wall and trash bins are visible in the corner. A person is crouched near the bins. The lighting is significantly darker than the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching NCART transit station

events.description: exits the narrow alley back onto the main commercial street
crosses the street toward the NCART station entrance

agents.ego_description: exits the alley and crosses the wet street toward the illuminated NCART station building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white suit walking along the sidewalk near the station

entered.detail: large transit station with illuminated teal 'NCART' signage on facade
gray concrete blocks lining the edge of the street
modern street lamp with horizontal LED bar emitting white light

segments.scene_description: The character exits the alley back onto the main street, which is wet and reflective. The NCART station building becomes visible ahead with its distinctive teal neon signage. The character crosses the street, passing concrete barriers and approaching the station entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station entrance with green neon lighting and holographic displays

events.description: enters the covered NCART station area with green neon illumination
ambient lighting shifts to dominant green neon glow from entrance gates

agents.ego_description: approaches and enters the NCART station, walking past the green neon entrance gates

entered.detail: glass and metal entrance structure with vertical green neon light bars
floating holographic display with pink and blue geometric shapes
concrete staircase leading upward to platform level

segments.scene_description: The character enters the NCART station area, which is illuminated by distinctive green neon lights. The entrance features glass gates with vertical neon bars and holographic advertisements. The environment transitions from the open street to a semi-covered transit area with tiled flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and elevated highway structure

events.description: ascends stairs from underground station to open plaza level
emerges from dark station interior into foggy but more open and naturally lit area

agents.ego_description: walks up the concrete stairs from the station entrance into the open plaza above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing at top of stairs looking at phone

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible through the fog in the plaza
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the plaza
tall modern street lamps with horizontal LED bars illuminating the open area

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs from the NCART station, emerging into a wide open plaza. Tall palm trees are visible through the fog, and an elevated highway structure spans the left side. The lighting shifts from the green neon interior to a mix of ambient city light and foggy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded back alley through a vibrant commercial district and back into a dimly lit corridor. It begins with the character standing over a body in a narrow alley marked by metal shutters and orange construction barriers before moving forward to exit onto a main street. As the character enters the open road, the environment transforms into a hazy, neon-lit commercial hub filled with digital billboards, scattered pedestrians, and the blur of a passing futuristic car. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, leaving the bright lights behind to enter a narrow alleyway enclosed by a wrought iron gate. Finally, the lighting dims significantly as the camera passes orange scaffolding and trash bins where another figure crouches in the shadows.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wet, neon-lit street through a transit hub and up into a foggy open plaza. It begins as the character exits a narrow alley onto a reflective main road, moving past concrete barriers toward the teal neon signage of an NCART station. As the character crosses the street, the scene shifts into the semi-covered transit area, where the lighting transitions to vibrant green neon bars and holographic advertisements across tiled flooring. The camera then follows the character ascending a set of stairs, leaving the enclosed station behind to emerge into a wide plaza. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal tall palm trees and an elevated highway structure shrouded in a thick, ambient city fog.
